description.value:
Prerequisite: Base attack bonus +4.

Benefit: Whenever the user successfully deals damage to an opponent that is under the effect of the Staggered condition, the duration of Staggered is increased by 1 round. This ability can be used once per day for every 4 hit dice of the user and its use must be declared before the attack roll is made.
